description: An activity, release, or hot event in the media space, such as campaign launches, content releases, or trending social incidents

name.description: Name of the event, e.g. 618大促, 春晚直播, 某品牌新品发布会

date.description: Date when the event occurs or occurred, in YYYY-MM-DD format

platform.description: Platform where the event takes place or is primarily discussed

participants.description: Notable participants, creators, or brands involved in the event

impact.description: Description of the event's impact or significance, including reach or engagement
